texto: Stop being the shy boy that wants to do everything right and responsibly. I’m sick of your honorable intentions Eli. In fifty years, when I’m old in my bed I want to wake up when the sun shines in my window and know that the person lying beside me was the right choice. I don’t want to look at someone else and always wish it was you.” ~ Maggie Parsons from Epitaphs from the Afterlife
explicacao: Citação de Autumn Rosen sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Stop being the shy boy that wants to do everything right and responsibly. I’m sick of your honora…” articula reflexao, love-story, right em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
